top_categories.workout_context: Race-pace efforts that mimic Giro Sardegna Gravel's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before May.
Giro Sardegna Gravel's Fast coastal gravel (non-technical), Rolling terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 66 miles.
When someone attacks on southeast Sardinia coastal gravel—fast, rolling,, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
66 miles on southeast Sardinia coastal gravel—fast, rolling, burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
62ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
At Giro Sardegna Gravel, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Giro Sardegna Gravel. Train it until it feels boring.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on southeast Sardinia coastal gravel—fast, rolling,. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Giro Sardegna Gravel, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Varied gradients on southeast Sardinia coastal gravel—fast, rolling, demand climbing versatility. Sit the shallow stuff, stand the steep stuff, switch without thinking.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 4,100ft of climbing on southeast Sardinia coastal gravel—fast, rolling, does to your power file on race day.
Double-threshold training builds sustained power with less fatigue. More FTP per hour of training.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for Giro Sardegna Gravel’s 66 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Giro Sardegna Gravel requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on southeast sardinia coastal gravel—fast, rolling, non-technical to build confidence. Expect: fast coastal gravel (non-technical), rolling terrain, coastal views.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Race Simulation, Gravel Specific, and VO2max to prepare you for 66 miles of southeast sardinia coastal gravel—fast, rolling, non-technical in Muravera-Villasimius, Sardinia, Italy.
